tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated HbA1c, indicating poor long-term glycemic control, and mildly increased creatinine, suggesting possible renal impairment. Lipid profile reveals hypercholesterolemia and high LDL, increasing cardiovascular risk. Total CO2 is slightly low, which may indicate mild metabolic acidosis. Further clinical correlation and follow-up are recommended for diabetes, renal function, and cardiovascular risk management.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
